lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too aape karataa teraa keea sabh hoe |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Creator. Everything that happens is by Your Doing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: There is no one except You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too kar kar vekheh jaaneh soe |
lines.english: You created the creation; You behold it and understand it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak guramukh paragatt hoe |4|2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Lord is revealed through the Gurmukh, the Living Expression of the Guru's Word. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਸਰਵਰੜੈ ਭਈਲੇ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਾਵਕੁ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tit saravararrai bheele nivaasaa paanee paavak tineh keea |
lines.english: In that pool, people have made their homes, but the water there is as hot as fire!

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਕਜੁ ਮੋਹ ਪਗੁ ਨਹੀ ਚਾਲੈ ਹਮ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਡੂਬੀਅਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pankaj moh pag nahee chaalai ham dekhaa teh ddoobeeale |1|
lines.english: In the swamp of emotional attachment, their feet cannot move. I have seen them drowning there. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਲਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bisarat tere gun galiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You have forgotten the Lord; your virtues shall wither away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਏਕੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਸਿ ਮੂੜ ਮਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man ek na chetas moorr manaa |
lines.english: In your mind, you do not remember the One Lord-you fool!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਨਹੀ ਪੜਿਆ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa hau jatee satee nahee parriaa moorakh mugadhaa janam bheaa |
lines.english: I am not celibate, nor truthful, nor scholarly. I was born foolish and ignorant into this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾ ਜਿਨ ਤੂ ਨਾਹੀ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak tin kee saranaa jin too naahee veesariaa |2|3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I seek the Sanctuary of those who have not forgotten You, O Lord! ||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰਿ ਕਾਜ ਤੇਰੈ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: avar kaaj terai kitai na kaam |
lines.english: Nothing else will work.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਈ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਦੇਹੁਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhee paraapat maanukh dehureea |
lines.english: This human body has been given to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਮਿਲਣ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gobind milan kee ih teree bareea |
lines.english: This is your chance to meet the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੰਜਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੁ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਰਨ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: saranjaam laag bhavajal taran kai |
lines.english: Make every effort to cross over this terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਭਜੁ ਕੇਵਲ ਨਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mil saadhasangat bhaj keval naam |1|
lines.english: Join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; vibrate and meditate on the Jewel of the Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਨ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam dharam na kamaaeaa |
lines.english: I have not practiced meditation, self-discipline, self-restraint or righteous living.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਜਾਤ ਰੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam brithaa jaat rang maaeaa kai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are squandering this life uselessly in the love of Maya. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾਧ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa saadh na jaaniaa har raaeaa |
lines.english: I have not served the Holy; I have not acknowledged the Lord, my King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਮ ਨੀਚ ਕਰੰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak ham neech karamaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, my actions are contemptible!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਕੀ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਰਮਾ ॥੨॥੪॥
lines.translit: saran pare kee raakhahu saramaa |2|4|
lines.english: O Lord, I seek Your Sanctuary; please, preserve my honor! ||2||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਦੀਪਕੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sohilaa raag gaurree deepakee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Sohilaa ~ The Song Of Praise. Raag Gauree Deepakee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਘਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jai ghar keerat aakheeai karate kaa hoe beechaaro |
lines.english: In that house where the Praises of the Creator are chanted and contemplated

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ਸਿਵਰਿਹੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tit ghar gaavahu sohilaa sivarihu sirajanahaaro |1|
lines.english: -in that house, sing Songs of Praise; meditate and remember the Creator Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਾ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: tum gaavahu mere nirbhau kaa sohilaa |
lines.english: Sing the Songs of Praise of my Fearless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੋਹਿਲੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jit sohilai sadaa sukh hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that Song of Praise which brings eternal peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਸਮਾਲੀਅਨਿ ਦੇਖੈਗਾ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: nit nit jeearre samaaleean dekhaigaa devanahaar |
lines.english: Day after day, He cares for His beings; the Great Giver watches over all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਨੈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਾਤੇ ਕਵਣੁ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tere daanai keemat naa pavai tis daate kavan sumaar |2|
lines.english: Your Gifts cannot be appraised; how can anyone compare to the Giver? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਸਜਣ ਅਸੀਸੜੀਆ ਜਿਉ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸਿਉ ਮੇਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dehu sajan aseesarreea jiau hovai saahib siau mel |3|
lines.english: My friends, give me your blessings, that I may merge with my Lord and Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਬਤਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਤੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sanbat saahaa likhiaa mil kar paavahu tel |
lines.english: The day of my wedding is pre-ordained. Come, gather together and pour the oil over the threshold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਏਹੋ ਪਾਹੁਚਾ ਸਦੜੇ ਨਿਤ ਪਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar eho paahuchaa sadarre nit pavan |
lines.english: Unto each and every home, into each and every heart, this summons is sent out; the call comes each and every day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਅ ਘਰ ਛਿਅ ਗੁਰ ਛਿਅ ਉਪਦੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: chhia ghar chhia gur chhia upades |
lines.english: There are six schools of philosophy, six teachers, and six sets of teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਣਹਾਰਾ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਦਿਹ ਆਵੰਨਿ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadanahaaraa simareeai naanak se dih aavan |4|1|
lines.english: Remember in meditation the One who summons us; O Nanak, that day is drawing near! ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਤੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so ghar raakh vaddaaee toe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: -follow that system; in it rests true greatness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਏਕੋ ਵੇਸ ਅਨੇਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur gur eko ves anek |1|
lines.english: But the Teacher of teachers is the One, who appears in so many forms. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਜੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa jai ghar karate keerat hoe |
lines.english: O Baba: that system in which the Praises of the Creator are sung

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰਜੁ ਏਕੋ ਰੁਤਿ ਅਨੇਕ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਵੇਸ ॥੨॥੨॥
lines.translit: sooraj eko rut anek | naanak karate ke kete ves |2|2|
lines.english: And the various seasons originate from the one sun; O Nanak, in just the same way, the many forms originate from the Creator. ||2||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸੁਏ ਚਸਿਆ ਘੜੀਆ ਪਹਰਾ ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰੀ ਮਾਹੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: visue chasiaa gharreea paharaa thitee vaaree maahu hoaa |
lines.english: The seconds, minutes and hours, days, weeks and months,
